forgotPassword.title: Recover Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive the reset link
forgotPassword.errorSend: Unable to send the reset email. Check the address you entered.
forgotPassword.successDescription: Check your inbox. If the address is registered, you will soon receive a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new secure password for your account
resetPassword.errorMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.errorUpdateFailed: Unable to update password. The link may have expired.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.successDescription: Your password has been changed successfully. You will be redirected to your profile...
changePassword.mustChange: You must change your temporary password before continuing.
changePassword.errorMinLength: The new password must be at least 8 characters long.
changePassword.errorMismatch: The new passwords do not match.
changePassword.errorMustBeDifferent: The new password must be different from the current one.
changePassword.errorSessionInvalid: Invalid session. Please log in again.

forceChangePassword.title: Password change required
forceChangePassword.description: For security reasons, you must change the temporary password you received before accessing the application.
forceChangePassword.temporaryPasswordPlaceholder: Enter the temporary password you received
forceChangePassword.newPasswordHint: Choose a secure password, different from the temporary one
forceChangePassword.errorMinLength: The new password must be at least 8 characters long.
forceChangePassword.errorMismatch: The new passwords do not match.
forceChangePassword.errorSame: The new password must be different from the temporary one.
forceChangePassword.errorReLogin: Error during re-login with the new password.

setPassword.title: Welcome to ZeroCento
setPassword.description: Set your password to get started.
setPassword.errorMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
setPassword.errorGeneric: Unable to set password. Please try again.

validation.passwordMissingUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordMissingLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordMissingNumber: Password must contain at least one number
